name: AMG Web3 Ecosystem
description: Full-cycle investment platform for tokenised real-world assets. Investor portal, admin layer, .NET 8 Clean Architecture backend, and Solidity smart contracts. Supports FOUNDATION & FRONTIER product lines with KYC gates, on-chain settlements, and compliance automation.

name: imBearth Platform
description: Web3 platform built on Next.js with modern blockchain integrations. Developed investor-facing features, smart contract interactions, and responsive UI for the imBearth ecosystem.

name: Acer Contact Service System
description: In-house service management platform for Acer's laptop repair network. TNT/FedEx EDI integration with multiple document formats, DHL payment gateway, i18n localisation, SSRS reports, and SSIS data pipelines.

name: HealthAssure Product System
description: Corporate health benefits platform with Apollo Pharmacy and Doc24x7 integrations. Mobile-ready REST APIs powering iOS and Android apps for enterprise clients and general consumers.

name: IGI Laboratory System
description: Diamond grading portal for IGI with e-signature, camera library, global data sync executables, Crystal Reports with generic loader, Rapaport pricing API, and bar-graph property visualisation.

name: Bajaj Electricals Gift Card
description: End-to-end gift card service: code generation, email delivery, redemption, and payment management. Salesforce integration for UTM tracking and analytics.

name: Diamond Inventory System
description: Comprehensive diamond inventory management system for retailers and labs. Features stock tracking, grading records, valuation reports, Rapaport pricing API integration, and Crystal Reports generation.

name: Dynaroof
description: Corporate web platform for Dynaroof, a construction and roofing solutions company. Built product catalogue, project showcase, and inquiry management modules.

name: Bajaj FinServ Web Platform
description: Corporate web application for one of India's largest financial services companies. Umbraco CMS-based, with Salesforce API integration for lead tracking, UTM analytics, and data pipelines.
